title: Ancient Egypt
description: Agent, we've detected a high-energy anachronism: a modern smartphone... near the Great Pyramid. This is a Level 4 destabilization event. Find it and retrieve it!

title: Renaissance Italy
description: This is a strange one. Our sensors are picking up... a pair of cheap sunglasses... inside a Florentine workshop. Retrieve them before someone invents 'art-pop'.

title: American Wild West
description: We've got a... synthesizer keyboard... at a saloon in Tombstone. The local piano player is confused and angry. Secure the artifact before this turns into a synth-wave showdown.

title: Feudal Japan
description: Agent, a temporal echo is originating from 1603 Japan. We're detecting a high-tech surveillance drone near Edo Castle. Secure it before it's reverse-engineered.

title: Roaring Twenties NYC
description: Sensors are going wild in 1925 New York. A civilian is reportedly 'seeing other worlds' on a street corner. It's a VR headset. Get it before it inspires a very strange sci-fi cult.

title: Ancient Greece
description: Agent, we've detected a temporal anomaly in ancient Athens. A modern laptop has appeared in the Agora. The philosophers are calling it 'the thinking box of the gods.' Retrieve it before it disrupts the birth of democracy.

title: Colonial America
description: Temporal sensors are detecting a modern GPS device in 1775 Boston. The Sons of Liberty think it's a British spy device. Secure it before it becomes evidence in the Boston Massacre trial.

title: Industrial Revolution
description: Agent, we've got a serious problem in 1850s Manchester. A modern smartphone has appeared in a textile factory. The workers think it's a new invention from the future. Get it before it inspires premature mobile technology.

title: Medieval Europe
description: Temporal anomaly detected in 12th century France. A modern tablet has appeared in a monastery scriptorium. The monks believe it's a divine writing device. Retrieve it before it becomes a holy relic.

title: Viking Age
description: Agent, we've detected a modern drone in 9th century Scandinavia. The Vikings think it's Odin's raven Muninn. Secure it before they start worshipping it and change Norse mythology forever.
